user.title: Discovered devices
user.description: Select a device to add, or enter connection parameters manually.

manual.title: Connect to device
manual.description: Enter connection parameters for the relay board.

data_description.host: IP address of the hhc-n8i8op board
data_description.protocol: TCP or UDP — must match the device work mode setting
data_description.channel_count: Physical output channels on the board (1–8)

data_description.device_name: Name stored on the relay board (AT+NAME)
data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the device state (0.2–10 seconds)
data_description.input_mode: After factory reset buttons are Unlinked (do nothing). Choose Trigger to make them toggle relays.
data_description.work_mode: Network protocol. Changing work mode AND IP at the same time may not apply — change them separately and reboot between changes.

set_input_mode.name: Set input mode
set_input_mode.description: Change how physical buttons interact with relays. Sends AT+INMODE via UDP broadcast.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: "unlinked" — buttons decoupled from relays, "trigger" — buttons directly toggle their relays, "auto" — auto-send state on button change

set_work_mode.name: Set work mode
set_work_mode.description: Change the device network protocol. Warning: this may break the current connection.

read_device_config.name: Read device configuration
read_device_config.description: Discover device and read its current hardware configuration.
